# Personal Data Privacy Protection Law

Jurisdiction: Qatar
Region: QA
Citation: Law No. 13 of 2016 Concerning Personal Data Privacy Protection
Authority: National Cyber Security Agency / National Cyber Governance and Assurance Affairs
Source URL: https://assurance.ncsa.gov.qa/en/privacy/law
Topics: notice_transparency, consent, data_subject_rights, security_breach, sensitive_data, cross_border_transfer
Keywords: Qatar PDPPL, Law No. 13 of 2016, NCSA, personal data privacy

## Summary
Qatar's personal data privacy law governing personal data processing, individual rights, safeguards, and competent-authority oversight.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide notices and respect individual privacy rights.
- Protect personal data with organisational and technical precautions.
- Assess sensitive data, electronic marketing, and transfer contexts.
